_note: Captured on Linux CI via run-benchmark-snapshot label trigger (build 24541900208). langflow_run_http_ready remains sentinel: the structlog processor pipeline swallows uvicorn's 'Application startup complete.' marker, so the supervisor times out. langflow_run_no_change_restart is a new Phase 4 SVC-01 D-03 scenario; it lands here as a sentinel until a run-benchmark-snapshot label trigger captures authoritative Linux numbers. Fix for the structlog marker is deferred to Phase 4/5 when langflow lifespan work touches logging. measurement_mode is bytecode_compile_delta per D-11a.
